V-01.name: Outreach List Scrutiny
V-01.verification_method: Manual founder review of 25 targets to ensure ideal customer fit.

V-02.name: Statement of Work Sign-off
V-02.verification_method: Founder signature verification via gpg or manual check in authority_binding_ledger.jsonl.

V-03.name: Upfront Payment Verification
V-03.verification_method: Bank / processor confirmation of 50% deposit before kickoff.

V-04.name: Deliverable Sign-off
V-04.verification_method: Client written approval of completed reports.
